title: Manufactured Building and Mobile Home Installers
description: Move or install mobile homes or prefabricated buildings.

tasks.text: Seal open sides of modular units to prepare them for shipment, using polyethylene sheets, nails, and hammers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move and set up mobile homes or prefabricated buildings on owners' lots or at mobile home parks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect, examine, and test the operation of parts or systems to evaluate operating condition and to determine if repairs are needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Connect water hoses to inlet pipes of plumbing systems, and test operation of plumbing fixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove damaged exterior panels, repair and replace structural frame members, and seal leaks, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: List parts needed, estimate costs, and plan work procedures, using parts lists, technical manuals, and diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with customers or read work orders to determine the nature and extent of damage to units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install, repair, and replace units, fixtures, appliances, and other items and systems in mobile and modular homes, prefabricated buildings, or travel trailers, using hand tools or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reset hardware, using chisels, mallets, and screwdrivers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair leaks in plumbing or gas lines, using caulking compounds and plastic or copper pipe.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and repair frayed wiring, broken connections, or incorrect wiring, using ohmmeters, soldering irons, tape, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open and close doors, windows, and drawers to test their operation, trimming edges to fit, using jackplanes or drawknives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect electrical systems to outside power sources and activate switches to test the operation of appliances and light fixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refinish wood surfaces on cabinets, doors, moldings, and floors, using power sanders, putty, spray equipment, brushes, paints, or varnishes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
